task_completion.description: Verify that the three new tea products are created in the inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Inventory Items' list or form showing 'Chai Tea' (Sales price: $19.50), 'English Breakfast Tea' (Sales price: $16.00), and 'Darjeeling Reserve' (Sales price: $34.00).

task_completion.description: Verify a sales invoice is created for Alfreds Futterkiste with the correct items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Sales Invoice form or view for customer 'Alfreds Futterkiste' containing 5 boxes of Chai Tea and 10 boxes of English Breakfast Tea, with a total amount of $257.50.

task_completion.description: Verify a 50% deposit receipt is recorded into Cash on Hand.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Receipt form or view showing money received from 'Alfreds Futterkiste' deposited into 'Cash on Hand' for the amount of $128.75.

task_completion.description: Verify a credit note is issued for the damaged Chai Tea boxes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Credit Note form or view for 'Alfreds Futterkiste' containing 2 boxes of Chai Tea, with a total amount of $39.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the invoice is visible in the sales invoices list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Sales Invoices' tab/list view showing the invoice for 'Alfreds Futterkiste' with the invoice total of $257.50.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Manager.io web graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Manager.io interface at localhost:8080, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual accounting software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for authentic Manager.io UI elements like the left navigation menu (Inventory Items, Sales Invoices, Receipts, Credit Notes) rather than a text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the data into the appropriate software forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be typing the item names, prices, and quantities directly into the Manager.io input fields, not just writing the final calculated numbers into a notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Chai Tea sales price: $19.50. English Breakfast Tea sales price: $16.00. Darjeeling Reserve sales price: $34.00. Sales Invoice total must be exactly $257.50 (5 * $19.50 + 10 * $16.00). Receipt amount must be exactly $128.75 (50% deposit of the $257.50 invoice). Credit note amount must be exactly $39.00 (2 damaged Chai Tea boxes * $19.50).
